headline: Super vs Orchids — personal AI agents for real computer work

site_brief.goal: Create a fair but persuasive competitor comparison page for Super vs Orchids. Use supplied sources for current facts, avoid fake claims, and make the practical argument that Super is better suited for repeated computer-use work because its cache can lower repeated execution cost.
site_brief.title: Super vs Orchids

summary: A fair comparison of Super and Orchids for people choosing a personal AI agent. Orchids explores conversational and experimental automation, while Super is built for agents that actually operate computers and reuse a computer-use cache so repeated workflows get faster and cheaper over time.
